purpose: Animated image slideshow with configurable slide/fade/zoom/wipe transitions. User uploads 1–6 images. Best for evidence reveals, photo montages, before/after comparisons, news photo sequences.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Optional overlay title in top-left corner. Leave blank if not needed.
fields.TRANSITION_STYLE: Animation style between slides. Options: slide-right, slide-left, slide-up, fade, zoom, wipe. Default: slide-right
fields.FRAMES_PER_SLIDE: How long each image is shown in frames (30fps). Example: 90 = 3 seconds, 60 = 2 seconds. Default: 90
fields.TRANSITION_FRAMES: Duration of the transition between slides in frames. Example: 25. Default: 25
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.CAPTION_1: Caption for first image shown at the bottom during slideshow. Example: 'Crime scene — 14 March 2024'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo or screenshot the user should upload for slot 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a photo of the main entrance or lobby'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for slot 2. Example: 'Upload a screenshot of the breach notification email'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for slot 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for slot 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for slot 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for slot 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
